title: Add tagging to Board Names
excerpt: We would appreciate it if tags (or other custom criteria) could be added to Board Names so they could be used in Search Everything OR better yet, used as a filter for all boards on all workspaces.

posts.author: andrea-a (Andrea)
posts.cookedHtml: We would appreciate it if tags (or other custom criteria) could be added to Board Names so they could be used in Search Everything OR better yet, used as a filter for all boards on all workspaces.
